title: Himachal Pradesh Technical University Result 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Himachal Pradesh Technical University Result 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Himachal Pradesh Technical University (HPTU) HPCET Result 2026 will be declared for UG and PG entrance courses on the official website - himtu.ac.in. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the HPTU HPCET result using your application number and date of birth.

content.text: Himachal Pradesh Technical University (HPTU), Hamirpur will declare the HPCET Result 2026 for various UG and PG entrance courses for the 2026-27 academic session on its official website. The result covers key programs such as B.Tech, B.Pharmacy (Direct Entry), MCA, MBA, and MBA (Tourism and Hospitality Management) for candidates who appeared in the Himachal Pradesh Common Entrance Test. HPTU Result 2026 will be available online on the official website - himtu.ac.in.

Students can check and download their HPCET scorecard and rank by logging in with their application number and date of birth on the result portal. After downloading the result, candidates are advised to carefully verify their personal details, scores, and rank, and contact Himachal Pradesh Technical University immediately in case of any discrepancy.

sections.heading: Himachal Pradesh Technical University Result 2026 Key Highlights

content.text: Himachal Pradesh Technical University HPCET Result 2026 will be released today for UG and PG entrance courses conducted for the 2026-27 academic session. The results are made available online at himtu.ac.in, where candidates can log in with their credentials to download their scorecard and check their rank for B.Tech, B.Pharmacy, MCA, MBA, and other programs. Students should keep their login details ready to access their HPCET 2026 result quickly and smoothly.

rows: B.Tech, B.Pharmacy (Direct Entry), MCA, MBA, MBA (Tourism and Hospitality Management)
Application number and date of birth
Counselling and admission process for eligible candidates

sections.heading: Himachal Pradesh Technical University Result 2026 Direct Link

content.text: Himachal Pradesh Technical University HPCET Result 2026 direct links will be activate today on the official website for all announced UG and PG entrance courses. Candidates who appeared for B.Tech, B.Pharmacy, MCA, MBA and other HPCET based programs can view or download their scorecard and rank instantly through the official portal using the links given below. Students must use their valid application number and date of birth to log in and check their individual HPCET 2026 result.

links.label: HPCET Result 2026 - MBA / MBA (Tourism and Hospitality Management)

sections.heading: How To Check HPCET Result 2026 Online

content.text: Follow the step by step process given below to check and download your HPCET Result 2026 from the official HPTU website:

items: Visit the official website of Himachal Pradesh Technical University at https://www.himtu.ac.in/.
On the homepage, go to the examination or result section and click on the HPCET Result 2026 link.
You will be redirected to the HPCET result login page.
Enter your application number and date of birth in the respective fields.
Click on the submit or login button to view your HPCET 2026 scorecard and rank.
Check your name, roll number, subject wise marks, total marks, and rank displayed on the screen.
Download the result or take a printout for future counselling and admission reference.

structured_links.label: HPCET Result 2026 - MBA / MBA (Tourism and Hospitality Management)
